name: Buttermilk-Cheese Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the flour, baking powder, baking soda, dry mustard, and salt.
2. Add the shredded Cheddar cheese to the flour mixture; set aside.
3. In another bowl, beat together the buttermilk, oil, and eggs until well blended.
4. Pour the wet ingredients into the flour mixture and stir just until moistened.
5. Transfer the batter to a greased 9-inch by 5-inch by 3-inch loaf pan.
6. Bake at 375°F for 45-50 minutes or until a pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Allow the bread to cool in the pan for 10 minutes before inverting it onto a wire rack to cool completely.
